case_title: DENISE SANFORD VS. LE QUYNH THI DBA TOP NAIL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANFORD, DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT LE QUYNH THI DBA TOP NAIL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-23-2010 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
